commands: vite update testnpm2 && cat package.json # should update package within semver range
vite up testnpm2 --latest && cat package.json # should to absolute latest version
vite update -D && cat package.json # should update only dev dependencies
vite update -P --no-save && cat package.json # should update only dependencies and optionalDependencies without saving
vite rm testnpm2 && vite add testnpm2@1.0.0 -O && vite update --no-optional --latest && cat package.json # should skip optional dependencies
vite update && vite update --recursive && cat package.json # should update all packages and change the package.json
